title: Resolver conflitos de merge no config/CRONS.json
job:
Resolver conflitos de merge no config/CRONS.json

**PROBLEMA:**
O job anterior (branch: job/7b03d2ea-bb28-4020-b49d-b7f162e9358d) teve conflitos de merge no arquivo `config/CRONS.json`.

**Conflitos identificados:**

1. **Caminhos errados no job anterior:** `/job/skills/...` (deve ser `/app/skills/...`)
2. **Entradas duplicadas/extra na main:**
   - `weather-morning` (6h)
   - `weather-lunch` (12h)

**RESOLUÇÃO ESPERADA:**

O arquivo final `config/CRONS.json` deve ficar assim:

```json
[
  {
    "name": "heartbeat",
    "schedule": "*/30 * * * *",
    "type": "agent",
    "job": "Read the file at config/HEARTBEAT.md and complete the tasks described there.",
    "enabled": false
  },
  {
    "name": "daily-check",
    "schedule": "0 9 * * *",
    "type": "agent",
    "job": "Check for dependency updates in package.json and report any outdated packages.",
    "enabled": false
  },
  {
    "name": "ping",
    "schedule": "*/1 * * * *",
    "type": "command",
    "command": "echo \"pong!\"",
    "enabled": true
  },
  {
    "name": "cleanup-logs",
    "schedule": "0 0 * * 0",
    "type": "command",
    "command": "ls -la logs/",
    "enabled": false
  },
  {
    "name": "ping-status",
    "schedule": "*/5 * * * *",
    "type": "webhook",
    "url": "https://example.com/status",
    "method": "POST",
    "vars": { "source": "heartbeat" },
    "enabled": false
  },
  {
    "name": "health-check",
    "schedule": "*/10 * * * *",
    "type": "webhook",
    "url": "https://example.com/health",
    "method": "GET",
    "enabled": false
  },
  {
    "name": "daily-check-openai",
    "schedule": "0 9 * * *",
    "type": "agent",
    "job": "Check for dependency updates in package.json and report any outdated packages.",
    "llm_provider": "openai",
    "llm_model": "gpt-4o",
    "enabled": false
  },
  {
    "name": "weather-morning",
    "schedule": "0 6 * * *",
    "type": "command",
    "command": "/app/skills/weather-forecast/forecast.sh",
    "enabled": true
  },
  {
    "name": "weather-lunch",
    "schedule": "0 12 * * *",
    "type": "command",
    "command": "/app/skills/weather-forecast/forecast.sh",
    "enabled": true
  },
  {
    "name": "weather-06h",
    "schedule": "0 6 * * *",
    "type": "command",
    "command": "/app/skills/weather-bot/send-scheduled.sh 6",
    "enabled": true
  },
  {
    "name": "weather-08h",
    "schedule": "0 8 * * *",
    "type": "command",
    "command": "/app/skills/weather-bot/send-scheduled.sh 8",
    "enabled": true
  },
  {
    "name": "weather-10h",
    "schedule": "0 10 * * *",
    "type": "command",
    "command": "/app/skills/weather-bot/send-scheduled.sh 10",
    "enabled": true
  },
  {
    "name": "weather-12h",
    "schedule": "0 12 * * *",
    "type": "command",
    "command": "/app/skills/weather-bot/send-scheduled.sh 12",
    "enabled": true
  },
  {
    "name": "weather-14h",
    "schedule": "0 14 * * *",
    "type": "command",
    "command": "/app/skills/weather-bot/send-scheduled.sh 14",
    "enabled": true
  },
  {
    "name": "weather-16h",
    "schedule": "0 16 * * *",
    "type": "command",
    "command": "/app/skills/weather-bot/send-scheduled.sh 16",
    "enabled": true
  },
  {
    "name": "weather-18h",
    "schedule": "0 18 * * *",
    "type": "command",
    "command": "/app/skills/weather-bot/send-scheduled.sh 18",
    "enabled": true
  }
]
```

**TAREFA:**

1. Fazer checkout da branch principal (main)
2. Editar `config/CRONS.json` com o conteúdo correto acima
3. Commitar a correção
4. Verificar se os scripts referenciados existem:
   - `/app/skills/weather-bot/send-scheduled.sh`
   - `/app/skills/weather-forecast/forecast.sh`
5. Se não existirem, criar ou remover as entradas correspondentes

**IMPORTANTE:**
- Todos os caminhos devem usar `/app/` (não `/job/`)
- Manter todas as entradas de weather
- Verificar se os scripts existem antes de commitar
